Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Replace native macOS tabs with custom fixed-width left-aligned tab bar

Native NSWindow tabs stretch to fill the full window width, which looks
bloated with 1-2 tabs. This replaces them with a custom CustomTabBarView
that renders left-aligned tabs with a max-width of 180px.

- Add TabState to hold per-tab split container, status bar, and title
- Add CustomTabBarView with close-on-hover, accent underline, + button
- Refactor TerminalWindowController to manage tabs via content swapping
  in a single window instead of native tab groups
- Add right-click context menu on tabs \(Rename, Close, Close Others\)
- Add Cmd+Shift+]/[ shortcuts for next/prev tab navigation
- Pause StatusBarView polling timer for background tabs to save CPU
- Remove native tab menu injection from AppDelegate

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add configurable themes, scrollback search, hyperlinks, and tab reorder

- TOML-based AppConfig for font, theme colors, and keybindings
- Scrollback search \(Cmd+F\) with match navigation
- OSC 8 hyperlink support \(Cmd+click to open URLs\)
- Tab drag-to-reorder in custom tab bar
- Fix color space crash \(grayscale NSColor → sRGB conversion\)
- Fix vtable crash \(CustomTabBarView → final class\)
- Remove PUA character from git branch display
- Update plan.md with completed phases and current status

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit --amend -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Add inline diff viewer, smart copy, and generating state

Diff viewer: colored backgrounds for diff regions — green for
additions, red for deletions, purple for hunk headers, dim for
diff --git lines.

Smart copy: strip ``` fence lines when Cmd+C selection falls
entirely within a code block region.

Generating state: track isGenerating/generationPhase in
TerminalView, fire onGeneratingChanged callback on PTY output
and idle timeout.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh release create v0.8.4 docs/AwalTerminal.zip --title "v0.8.4" --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Features

- **Context usage breakdown** — Click the tokens label or context bar to see a detailed popover with estimated usage by category \(system + messages, memory files, skills & rules\), free space, autocompact buffer, memory file list with token counts, and active skills
- **Danger mode** — New `--dangerously-skip-permissions` flag support with visual badge indicator
- **Kitty keyboard protocol** — Full support for the Kitty keyboard protocol
- **Synchronized output** — Support for synchronized output mode \(DCS sequences\)
- **Quick Look preview** — Preview files directly from the terminal

## Improvements

- Remove per-read Vec allocation in PTY processing hot path for better performance
- Extract AwalTerminalLib library target for improved testability
- Synchronize audioLevel access between audio and UI threads
- Replace Metal resource force unwraps with guard let for crash safety
- Stop display link during renderer recreation on scale change
- Replace unwrap/expect with _exit\(1\) in forked PTY child process

## Testing & CI

- Add GitHub Actions CI pipeline
- Add E2E smoke tests using AppleScript
- Add unit tests for core logic modules \(110 tests\)
- Add test-swift and test-rust recipes to justfile
- Require passing tests with 90%+ coverage before release

## Security

- Sanitize profile names to prevent directory traversal
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Bundle JetBrains Mono as default terminal font

Ship JetBrains Mono Regular and Bold \(OFL-1.1 licensed\) inside the app
bundle for a consistent look without requiring font installation.
Fonts are registered at process scope on launch via CoreText and used
as the default when no font.family is configured. The bundle script
copies font files into Contents/Resources/Fonts/.
EOF
\)")
Bash(cd /Users/brahim/Projects/Workspace/Code/awal-terminal/app && swift build -c release --arch arm64 --arch x86_64 2>&1 | tail -5)

Bash(gh release create v0.9.0 docs/AwalTerminal.zip --title "v0.9.0" --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Features

- **Bundled JetBrains Mono font** — JetBrains Mono \(Regular & Bold\) is now shipped inside the app as the default terminal font, ensuring a consistent look across machines without requiring font installation
- **New default background color** — Default background changed to a dark blue-gray \(#2D3039\) for a more refined appearance

## Improvements

- Fix missing app icon after source tree restructure

## Notes

- Fonts are registered at process scope \(no system-wide side effects\)
- JetBrains Mono is licensed under OFL-1.1 \(license included in bundle\)
- Users can still override the font via `font.family` in config
EOF
\)")

Bash(gh release create v0.10.0 docs/AwalTerminal.zip --title "v0.10.0" --notes "$\(cat <<'EOF'
## Features

## Improvements

- Quit on last window close from quick terminal
EOF
\)")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix app freeze when closing tabs

Add explicit cleanup lifecycle for terminal views to prevent three
issues: CVDisplayLink use-after-free from dangling raw pointer,
zombie child processes from missing Pty::Drop, and unreliable
teardown caused by deinit depending on async reference release.

- Add Drop impl for Pty that sends SIGHUP/SIGKILL and reaps child
- Add at_surface_terminate\(\) FFI to kill child before surface destroy
- Add TerminalView.cleanup\(\) with idempotency guard for deterministic
  teardown of display link, dispatch sources, timers, and surface
- Fix CVDisplayLink to use passRetained with weak dispatch to prevent
  use-after-free on deallocated view
- Call cleanup in all tab/window/pane close paths
EOF
\)")

Bash(python3 << 'PYEOF'
import json

with open\('/Users/brahim/.claude/projects/-Users-brahim-Projects-Workspace-Code-awal-terminal/2be80a04-34cc-433a-87c9-9aeab337fdc2.jsonl'\) as f:
    lines = f.readlines\(\)

# Find the full growth plan content
for line in lines:
    try:
        obj = json.loads\(line\)
    except:
        continue
    if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user' and 'toolUseResult' in obj:
        result = obj.get\('toolUseResult', {}\)
        content = result.get\('content', ''\)
        if 'Growing Awal' in content:
            print\(content\)
            break
PYEOF)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
Fix FFI null pointer deref and add hook script approval gate

Add null check for the command pointer in at_surface_spawn_command to
prevent undefined behavior when Swift passes nil.

Require explicit user approval for registry hook scripts before
execution. Hooks are gated by SHA-256 content hash so modified scripts
are automatically revoked until re-reviewed. Add HookApprovalStore
persistence, config option \(ai_components.require_hook_approval\),
approval UI in the AI Components manager, and filter unapproved hooks
during injection.
EOF
\)")
